_instructions: Taskade and context7 are enabled by default. Set env vars for API keys: TASKADE_API_KEY, TASKADE_WORKSPACE_ID, VERCEL_TOKEN. Enable stitch when Google API key is ready.

taskade._purpose: Official Taskade MCP — manage workspaces, projects, tasks, and integrations.

context7._purpose: Live documentation lookup for Next.js, Tailwind, React, etc.

vercel._purpose: Deploy to Vercel, check build status, view logs, check domain availability.

stitch._purpose: Google Stitch API — Google Calendar, Gmail, and other Google services.

supabase-mcp-server._purpose: Database for storing client data, form submissions, etc.

notion-mcp-server._purpose: Connect to Notion to read/write pages.

apify._purpose: Web scraping at scale — useful for lead list building.

fireflies._purpose: Meeting transcription — pull notes and action items from calls.
